# Starting Equipment & Spells

## Starting Gold by Class

| Class | Starting Gold |
|-------|--------------|
| Barbarian | 2d4 × 10 GP |
| Bard | 5d4 × 10 GP (+ instrument) |
| Cleric | 5d4 × 10 GP (+ holy symbol) |
| Druid | 2d4 × 10 GP (+ druidic focus) |
| Fighter | 5d4 × 10 GP |
| Monk | 5d4 GP (no ×10) |
| Paladin | 5d4 × 10 GP (+ holy symbol) |
| Ranger | 5d4 × 10 GP |
| Rogue | 4d4 × 10 GP |
| Sorcerer | 3d4 × 10 GP |
| Warlock | 4d4 × 10 GP (+ arcane focus) |
| Wizard | 4d4 × 10 GP (+ spellbook) |

## Starting Equipment Packs

Give a sensible starting equipment pack based on class:
- Weapon(s), armor, adventurer's pack, class-specific item

## Starting Spells (Level 1 Casters)

| Class | Cantrips | Spells Known / Prepared |
|-------|----------|------------------------|
| Wizard | 3 | 6 in spellbook; prepare INT mod + 1 |
| Cleric | 3 | Prepare WIS mod + 1 from full list |
| Druid | 2 | Prepare WIS mod + 1 from full list |
| Bard | 2 | 4 spells known |
| Sorcerer | 4 | 2 spells known |
| Warlock | 2 | 2 spells known |
| Ranger | — | No spells at level 1 (gains at level 2) |
| Paladin | — | No spells at level 1 (gains at level 2) |

Generate spell options appropriate to the character concept and let the player choose.
